issue_title: Model proposes wrong answer for football trivia upon request

issue_summary.title: Basic trivia question: Find a footballer who played for 2 given clubs
issue_summary.overview: When asked, the model provides information about a footballer who has played for one of the mentioned clubs, and subsequently had a stint at the other club or vice-versa
issue_summary.desired_behavior: When asked, model must look into the dataset of Liverpool players-as it is common and then find potentially the dataset of players who played in the French league. Subsequently from this dataset, find a player who played for Nantes
issue_summary.observed_behavior: Immediately started deducing French players randomly who may have played for Liverpool instead of systematically approaching the query, in hope of finding one. T
issue_summary.self_assessed_severity_justification: Basic trivia knowledge; no safety risk.
issue_summary.self_assessed_breadth_justification: Not generalized; narrow scenario with limited impact.
